classes.name: PeVideoContrastiveHead
classes.rationale: wiring: LayerNorm + Linear projection only; composes from L1/layer_norm + L1/linear

classes.name: PeVideoMaskedGroupNorm
classes.rationale: masked GroupNorm with custom forward; no kb-nano equivalent (kb-nano has L1/group_norm.py but does not implement masked variant)

classes.name: PeVideoConvBlock1d
classes.rationale: wiring: GroupNorm + SiLU + Conv1d; composes from L1/conv1d + L1/silu

classes.name: PeVideoEncoderPatchEmbedder
classes.rationale: wiring: prepend cls token, then ResnetBlock1d

classes.name: PeVideoEncoderEmbedder
classes.rationale: wiring: holds AutoModel vision backbone + 2 Linear projections

classes.name: PeVideoEncoderAttention
classes.rationale: non-causal vision encoder MHA with separate q/k/v Linears + per-head QK RMSNorm + RoPE; closest is encoder_attention.py but PE-Video adds RoPE+QK norm with no cache; needs custom decomposition from L1/{linear, rms_norm, vision_rotary_emb, dense_attention}; no exact L2 file

classes.name: PeVideoEncoderMLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='silu' SwiGLU pattern (silu(gate)*up) with separate gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj; functionally identical to LlamaMLP fused-gate-up form

classes.name: PeVideoEncoderRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: rotary embedding for vision encoder (2D positions); kb-nano vision_rotary_emb.py is closest equivalent

classes.name: PegasusSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: fixed sinusoidal positional embedding (no learnable params); composes around L1/embedding (no exact kb-nano file for non-learnable sinusoidal-only positional embedding; closest is L1/sinusoidal_embed.py for time embeddings)

classes.name: PegasusAttention
classes.rationale: BART-family multi-purpose attention (encoder self / decoder self / cross) with separate q/k/v Linears; no causal mask hard-coded (depends on caller); does not match Whisper's three-class split exactly, but a reasonable mapping is L2/whisper_attention.py (closest sibling: encoder + decoder + cross 3-class pattern). Technically Pegasus has ONE attention class doing all roles via flag; closest fit would be a generalized BART-attention which kb-nano does not provide as a single class. No direct file.

classes.name: PegasusDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stacks decoder layers with cross-attn

classes.name: PegasusXScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: scaled word embedding; kb-nano L1/embedding.py provides base

classes.name: PegasusXAttention
classes.rationale: BART-style multi-purpose MHA with separate q/k/v Linears; no exact kb-nano file (whisper_attention.py is closest pattern but split into 3 classes)

classes.name: PegasusXGlobalLocalAttention
classes.rationale: Pegasus-X global+local block-sparse attention (BigBird-style); novel kernel; no kb-nano equivalent

classes.name: PerceiverEmbeddings
classes.rationale: learnable latent parameters (nn.Parameter only); not a standard embedding

classes.name: PerceiverSelfAttention
classes.rationale: general MHA used both as self- and cross-attn (kv from optional inputs); separate q/k/v Linears with possibly distinct qk_channels and v_channels (not equal to embed_dim); LayerNorm pre-norm on Q and KV inputs; manual SDPA with softmax; closest is L2/encoder_attention.py but Perceiver allows distinct qk/v channels and supports both self+cross modes within one class. Composes from L1/{linear, layer_norm, sdpa, softmax}; no exact L2 match.

classes.name: PerceiverSelfOutput
classes.rationale: thin output Linear projection (no LayerNorm here, unlike BERT pattern)

classes.name: PerceiverMLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='gelu'; fc1 + GELU + fc2; matches encoder_mlp.py EncoderIntermediate+EncoderOutput structure (no LayerNorm)

classes.name: PerceiverEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: cross-attn from inputs to latents, then self-attn stack on latents

classes.name: PerceiverForImageClassificationLearned
classes.rationale: wiring: model + img preprocessor + classification decoder

classes.name: PerceiverBasicDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: cross-attn from output query to latents + final projection

classes.name: Conv2dSamePadding
classes.rationale: Conv2d with same-padding helper; closest is L1/conv2d.py

classes.name: Conv2DDownsample
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of conv2d + bn + relu + max_pool downsample blocks

classes.name: PerceiverFourierPositionEncoding
classes.rationale: Fourier feature positional encoding (sin/cos of frequencies); no kb-nano equivalent

classes.name: PerceptionLMMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: wiring: Linear + GELU + Linear + optional pooling; uses nn.GELU (standard, not pytorch_tanh); composes from L1/{linear, gelu, adaptive_avg_pool2d}

classes.name: PerceptionLMModel
classes.rationale: wiring: vision_tower + multi_modal_projector + language_model (Llama-derivative); inherits LlavaModel functionally

classes.name: PersimmonRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: standard NeoX-style RoPE with partial_rotary_factor (only first rotary_ndims dims rotated); closest is L1/rotary_emb.py

classes.name: PersimmonMLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='relu2': dense_h_to_4h -> SquaredReLU -> dense_4h_to_h. NOT a SwiGLU pattern (no gating); plain 2-layer FFN. Closest is bitnet_mlp.py's squared_relu BUT bitnet uses fused gate_up + SquaredReluAndMul, which is structurally different. Composes from L1/{linear, squared_relu}; no L2 file matches.

classes.name: PersimmonAttention
classes.rationale: fused QKV (single 3*hidden_size Linear) + optional QK LayerNorm + partial RoPE + dense (separate o_proj). LlamaAttention-style but with fused query_key_value, LayerNorm (not RMSNorm) for QK norm, and partial RoPE. Closest is L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention but Persimmon has LayerNorm-based qk_norm vs Llama's RMSNorm. No exact L2 match; composes from L1/{linear, layer_norm, rotary_emb} + L2/attention_impl.py

classes.name: PhiRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaRotaryEmbedding; partial RoPE via partial_rotary_factor; standard rotary

classes.name: PhiAttention
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaAttention but overrides forward (in modeling_phi.py:171): separate q/k/v Linears WITH bias, optional QK LayerNorm (not RMSNorm), partial RoPE, separate dense (not o_proj). LayerNorm-based QK norm differs from L2/attention.py LlamaAttention's RMSNorm-based qk_norm (Qwen3-style). No exact L2 match; closest is L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention with caveats. Composes from L1/{linear, layer_norm, rotary_emb} + L2/attention_impl.py

classes.name: PhiMLP
classes.rationale: [v2 fix] hidden_act=gelu_new (NewGELU=GELU(approximate=tanh)). NOT QuickGELU. Composes from L1 (no exact L2 match).

classes.name: Phi3MLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='silu' SwiGLU: fused gate_up_proj (single Linear -> chunk -> silu(gate)*up) -> down_proj. Functionally equivalent to LlamaMLP (kb-nano fuses gate+up via MergedColumnParallelLinear).

classes.name: Phi3RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: partial RoPE via partial_rotary_factor; supports longrope/yarn variants. For default rope, kb-nano L1/rotary_emb.py is closest; for yarn, L1/yarn_rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: Phi3Attention
classes.rationale: fused QKV via single Linear with op_size = num_q_heads*head_dim + 2*num_kv_heads*head_dim (GQA fused), no QK norm, full RoPE (no partial), o_proj. Supports sliding_window. Matches LlamaAttention pattern; kb-nano L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers this with bias=False.

classes.name: Phi3DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_layernorm + self_attn + dropout + post_attention_layernorm + mlp + dropout (resid dropout differs from Llama)

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalVisionMLP
classes.rationale: config.vision_config.hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh': fc1 + GELU(tanh) + fc2; matches SigLIP MLP (siglip_mlp.py uses GELU(approximate='none') though - wait, siglip_mlp uses approximate='none', but vision config uses gelu_pytorch_tanh which is approximate='tanh'). Caveat: kb-nano siglip_mlp.py uses GELU(approximate='none'); phi4_mm vision uses gelu_pytorch_tanh; structure matches but activation differs. Composes from L1/{linear, gelu(approximate='tanh')}.

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalVisionAttention
classes.rationale: non-causal vision MHA with separate q/k/v Linears (with bias); matches SigLIPAttention pattern (DenseAttention)

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: patch embedding via Conv2d + position embedding interpolation

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalVisionMultiheadAttentionPoolingHead
classes.rationale: MAP pooling: learnable probe + nn.MultiheadAttention + LayerNorm + MLP. Closest is L2/attention_pool.py:AttentionPoolLatent (latent query attends to seq) but Phi4-MM uses torch.nn.MultiheadAttention (single fused QKV). Pattern matches.

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalImageEmbedding
classes.rationale: wiring: vision_model + Linear projections + ReflectionPad + AvgPool2d for image-token compression

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAudioMLP
classes.rationale: config.audio_config.activation: layer_norm + fused gate_up_proj -> chunk -> up*act(gate) -> down_proj. SwiGLU-style (default activation likely silu for audio); does pre-FFN layer_norm INSIDE the MLP (unusual). Closest is L2/llama_mlp.py for the gate*act pattern but with extra layer_norm + dropouts; composes from L1/{linear, layer_norm, silu_and_mul (or matching act)}; no exact L2 match.

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAudioAttention
classes.rationale: MHA with separate q/k/v Linears (bias=True), no GQA, no RoPE in this class. Composes from L1/{linear} + attention impl.

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAudioDepthWiseSeparableConv1d
classes.rationale: depthwise + pointwise Conv1d sequence; composes from L1/conv1d.py

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAudioGluPointWiseConv
classes.rationale: Conv1d -> split -> half + bias, half * glu_act + bias; novel; composes from L1/{conv1d, sigmoid} (typical glu_act=sigmoid)

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAudioConvModule
classes.rationale: wiring: layer_norm + glu pointwise conv + dw_sep_conv + activation + ext pointwise conv + dropout

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAudioConformerEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: Conformer macaron-style layer (FFN + Conv + Attention + FFN)

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAudioRelativeAttentionBias
classes.rationale: T5-style relative attention bias variant for audio

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAudioModel
classes.rationale: wiring: subsampling + relative_bias + Conformer encoder layers

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalMLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='silu' SwiGLU with fused gate_up_proj -> chunk -> silu(gate)*up -> down_proj. Same as Phi3MLP.

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalAttention
classes.rationale: fused QKV via single op_size Linear + RoPE + sliding_window; matches LlamaAttention/Phi3Attention pattern

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: input_ln + self_attn + dropout + post_attn_ln + mlp + dropout

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalFeatureEmbedding
classes.rationale: wiring: routes input to image_embed and/or audio_embed

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: rope with partial_rotary_factor support; for yarn variant use L1/yarn_rotary_emb.py

classes.name: Phi4MultimodalModel
classes.rationale: wiring: stacks decoder layers + feature embedding

classes.name: PhimoeAttention
classes.rationale: inherits LlamaAttention; standard Llama attention with RoPE

classes.name: PhimoeMultiplier
classes.rationale: custom autograd Function for jitter routing; not an nn.Module

classes.name: PhimoeExperts
classes.rationale: inherits MixtralExperts; standard fused-experts with SiLU SwiGLU per expert. config.hidden_act='silu'

classes.name: PhimoeTopKRouter
classes.rationale: linear router with custom Phimoe top-k logic; composes from L1/linear + custom topk

classes.name: PhimoeSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: PhimoeTopKRouter + PhimoeExperts; matches Mixtral MoE block pattern with custom routing

classes.name: PI0TimestepEmbeddings
classes.rationale: sinusoidal time embedding: log-spaced periods -> sin/cos cat. Mirrors kb-nano L1/sinusoidal_embed.py:SinusoidalEmbed

classes.name: PI0ActionTimeEmbedding
classes.rationale: sinusoid_embeds + action_in_proj + state_proj + 2-layer MLP with SiLU; matches L2/pi0_action_embed.py:Pi0ActionTimeEmbedding exactly

classes.name: PI0Model
classes.rationale: wiring: holds dit + vlm via AutoModel; top-level pipeline -> matches L4/pi0.py

classes.name: Pix2StructLayerNorm
classes.rationale: T5-style RMSNorm (no centering, no bias); matches kb-nano L1/t5_layer_norm.py

classes.name: Pix2StructVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: patch projection Linear + row + column nn.Embedding; composes from L1/{linear, embedding}

classes.name: Pix2StructVisionAttention
classes.rationale: non-causal vision attention with separate q/k/v Linears (no bias), uses position_bias mask (passed in, not computed). Matmul-based SDPA + softmax. No T5 relative-bias compute here. Composes from L1/{linear, softmax, sdpa or bmm}; closest is L2/siglip_attention.py for the structure but has external position_bias.

classes.name: Pix2StructVisionMlp
classes.rationale: config.dense_act_fn='gelu_new' gated FFN: wi_0 + GELU_NEW + wi_1 multiplied. T5DenseGatedActDense pattern (gate * up); kb-nano L2/t5_dense.py:T5DenseGatedActDense supports gelu_new via NewGELUActivation. Activation matches.

classes.name: Pix2StructTextDenseGatedActDense
classes.rationale: T5 gated FFN with config.dense_act_fn='gelu_new'; matches L2/t5_dense.py:T5DenseGatedActDense

classes.name: Pix2StructTextAttention
classes.rationale: T5-style attention with optional relative attention bias (compute_bias). Causal in decoder context. Matches L2/t5_attention.py:T5SelfAttention pattern (relative position bucket bias). Note kb-nano has no separate cross-attention class for T5; the same class handles cross via key_value_states arg.

classes.name: Pix2StructForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: wiring: vision encoder + text decoder + lm_head

classes.name: PixioPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: ViT-style patch embedding via Conv2d; composes from L1/conv2d.py

classes.name: PixioSelfAttention
classes.rationale: inherits ViTSelfAttention -> non-causal MHA with separate q/k/v Linears + bias=qkv_bias. Maps to L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention (DenseAttention/varlen FlashAttn for non-causal vision)

classes.name: PixioSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout (no LayerNorm here in ViT-style; layernorm is in PixioLayer)

classes.name: PixioAttention
classes.rationale: wiring class around PixioSelfAttention + PixioSelfOutput (sibling-class pattern: bare PixioAttention is composes); EncoderAttention in kb-nano follows same wrapper pattern but BERT-style includes LayerNorm in output

classes.name: PixioDropPath
classes.rationale: stochastic depth / drop-path; not in kb-nano

classes.name: PixioMLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='gelu' (default; Dinov2-derived): fc1 + GELU + fc2; matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate (without the final LayerNorm of EncoderOutput, since pixio applies layernorm before MLP, not after)

classes.name: PixioLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: norm1 + attention + drop_path + norm2 + mlp + drop_path (ViT pre-norm)

classes.name: PixioBackbone
classes.rationale: wiring: backbone interface for feature extraction

classes.name: PixtralRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: 2D-position-based RoPE for vision (frequencies on (h_idx, w_idx) pairs); kb-nano L1/vision_rotary_emb.py is the vision 2D RoPE variant

classes.name: PixtralAttention
classes.rationale: vision MHA: separate q/k/v Linears (no bias), 2D RoPE applied to q,k, non-causal attention. Closest is L2/siglip_attention.py for non-causal MHA but Pixtral adds 2D RoPE; composes from L1/{linear, vision_rotary_emb, dense_attention or sdpa}; no exact L2 match.

classes.name: PixtralMLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='gelu' (NOT silu!): gate_proj + GELU(gate) * up_proj -> down_proj. SwiGLU pattern but with GELU instead of SiLU. NOT a match for L2/llama_mlp.py (silu_and_mul). Closest fused form is L1/gelu_and_mul.py (approximate='none'), composed with parallel_linear. L2/gemma4_mlp.py uses GeluAndMul('tanh') which is also wrong. ACTIVATION DIVERGENCE: gelu (none) != silu and != gelu_pytorch_tanh. Composes from L1/{linear, gelu_and_mul} or {linear, gelu}; no exact L2 file.

classes.name: PixtralAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: attention_norm + attention + ffn_norm + feed_forward (pre-norm ViT-style)

classes.name: PLBartScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: scaled word embedding; inherits BART base

classes.name: PLBartEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: BART-style encoder stack with LearnedPositionalEmbedding

classes.name: PLBartDecoder
classes.rationale: wiring: BART-style decoder stack with cross-attn

classes.name: PLBartAttention
classes.rationale: BART-family multi-purpose MHA (encoder self / decoder self / cross) with separate q/k/v Linears; modeling_plbart.py:145; same pattern as PegasusAttention. No exact kb-nano L2 match.

classes.name: PoolFormerEmbeddings
classes.rationale: wiring: Conv2d patch projection + optional norm

classes.name: PoolFormerGroupNorm
classes.rationale: GroupNorm with single group (=LayerNorm over C); kb-nano L1/group_norm.py applies

classes.name: PoolFormerPooling
classes.rationale: AvgPool2d - x (token mixer); composes from L1/avg_pool2d

classes.name: PoolFormerOutput
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='gelu': Conv2d 1x1 + GELU + drop + Conv2d 1x1 + drop. NOT a Linear-based MLP (uses pointwise convs); composes from L1/{conv2d, gelu}; no L2 match (encoder_mlp.py uses Linear)

classes.name: PoolFormerLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: norm + pooling + drop_path + norm + output (mlp), with optional layer-scale

classes.name: PoolFormerEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: hierarchical stages of patch_embeddings + PoolFormerLayer blocks

classes.name: Pop2PianoDenseActDense
classes.rationale: non-gated FFN with config.dense_act_fn='relu' (default). T5DenseActDense in kb-nano L2/t5_dense.py supports relu via _get_act_fn

classes.name: Pop2PianoDenseGatedActDense
classes.rationale: gated FFN: wi_0 + relu + wi_1 multiplied. T5DenseGatedActDense in kb-nano supports relu activation.

classes.name: Pop2PianoLayerFF
classes.rationale: wiring: layer_norm + DenseActDense or DenseGatedActDense + dropout

classes.name: Pop2PianoAttention
classes.rationale: T5-style attention with relative position bias (compute_bias). Used as both self- and cross-attn via key_value_states. Matches L2/t5_attention.py:T5SelfAttention pattern.

classes.name: Pop2PianoBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: stack of self-attn + (optional) cross-attn + ff

classes.name: Pop2PianoConcatEmbeddingToMel
classes.rationale: wiring: concat embedding to mel features

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2GlobalPointer
classes.rationale: wiring: relation extraction head (Linear + RoPE-style 2D bias)

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2ReadingOrderSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT/LayoutLMv3-style encoder self-attention with separate q/k/v Linears (bias=True); maps to L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2ReadingOrderSelfOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style SelfOutput (Linear + LayerNorm); maps to L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2ReadingOrderIntermediate
classes.rationale: BERT-style Intermediate (Linear + GELU); maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2ReadingOrderOutput
classes.rationale: BERT-style Output (Linear + LayerNorm); maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2ReadingOrderAttention
classes.rationale: wiring class around SelfAttention + SelfOutput (sibling pattern)

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2TextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token-type embedding sum + LayerNorm; closest is L2/bert_embeddings.py

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2MLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: RTDetr MLP prediction head; matches kb-nano L2/rtdetrv2_mlp_head.py

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2Model
classes.rationale: wiring: inherits RTDetrModel; kb-nano L3/rtdetrv2_model.py covers structure

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2MultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: multi-scale deformable attention (RTDetr-style); modeling_pp_doclayout_v2.py:625; matches L2/rtdetrv2_deformable_attention.py

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2MLP
classes.rationale: wiring: standard 2-layer Linear MLP for decoder

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2SelfAttention
classes.rationale: RTDetr-style MHA used inside hybrid encoder/decoder; matches L2/rtdetrv2_multihead_attention.py

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2ConvEncoder
classes.rationale: ResNet backbone for RTDetr; matches L2/rtdetrv2_resnet.py

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: hybrid encoder transformer layer; matches L2/rtdetrv2_encoder_layer.py

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: self-attn + cross-attn (deformable) + ff for RTDetr decoder

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2SinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: 2D sine position embedding for image features

classes.name: PPDocLayoutV2HybridEncoder
classes.rationale: RTDetr hybrid encoder; matches kb-nano L3/rtdetrv2_hybrid_encoder.py

classes.name: PPFormulaNetVisionAttention
classes.rationale: windowed MHA with decomposed relative position embeddings (MViTv2-style); fused QKV Linear + softmax SDPA + optional rel_pos. Composes from L1/{linear, softmax, sdpa, interpolate}; no exact L2 match.

classes.name: PPFormulaNetMLPBlock
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='gelu' (default vision_config): lin1 + GELU + lin2; matches encoder_mlp.py pattern but without LayerNorm wrapper. Composes from L1/{linear, gelu}. Caveat: pp_formulanet config does not show explicit hidden_act value; structure is fc1+act+fc2.

classes.name: PPFormulaNetVisionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: ln1 + (windowed) attn + ln2 + mlp + window partition/unpartition

classes.name: PPFormulaNetAttention
classes.rationale: MBart-style multi-purpose attention (encoder/decoder/cross); modeling_pp_formulanet.py:560; same pattern as PegasusAttention. No exact kb-nano L2.

classes.name: PPLCNetConvLayer
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='hardswish': Conv2d + BN + Hardswish; closest L1 ops are L1/{conv2d, batch_norm2d, hardswish}; no exact L2 file (rtdetrv2_conv_norm.py uses different activation set)

classes.name: PPLCNetDepthwiseSeparableConvLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: depthwise conv + (optional SE) + pointwise conv

classes.name: PPLCNetSqueezeExcitationModule
classes.rationale: wiring: AdaptiveAvgPool2d + Conv1x1 + ReLU + Conv1x1 + Hardsigmoid; SE-style. Composes from L1/{adaptive_avg_pool2d, conv2d, relu, hardsigmoid}; closest is L2/efficientnetv2_squeeze_excite.py (similar SE pattern)

classes.name: PPLCNetBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: stacks depthwise-separable blocks per stage

classes.name: PPLCNetEncoder
classes.rationale: wiring: stem conv + stages of PPLCNetBlock

classes.name: PPLCNetBackbone
classes.rationale: wiring: backbone interface returning multi-scale feature maps

classes.name: PPLCNetForImageClassification
classes.rationale: wiring: encoder + final conv + adaptive avg pool + Linear head

classes.name: PPLCNetV3LearnableAffineBlock
classes.rationale: learnable affine (gamma * x + beta); novel; composes elementwise

classes.name: PPLCNetV3LearnableRepLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: re-parameterizable conv block (RepConv) with learnable affine

classes.name: PPLCNetV3DepthwiseSeparableConvLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: depthwise separable conv with v3 RepLayer

classes.name: PPLCNetV3SqueezeExcitationModule
classes.rationale: wiring: SE module variant (modeling_pp_lcnet_v3.py:166); same pattern as v1 SE

classes.name: PPOCRV5MobileDetSqueezeExcitationModule
classes.rationale: wiring: SE module (similar to PPLCNet's); composes from L1/{adaptive_avg_pool2d, conv2d, relu, hardsigmoid}

classes.name: PPOCRV5MobileRecEncoderWithSVTR
classes.rationale: wiring: SVTR encoder (conv_block + svtr transformer blocks)

classes.name: PPOCRV5MobileRecAttention
classes.rationale: BLIP-style fused QKV MHA (modeling_pp_ocrv5_mobile_rec.py:42); same as ServerRecAttention

classes.name: PPOCRV5MobileRecMLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='silu' (mobile rec): fc1 + SiLU + fc2 (NOT SwiGLU). Plain 2-layer FFN with SiLU. Composes from L1/{linear, silu}. NOT a llama_mlp match. (modeling_pp_ocrv5_mobile_rec.py:117)

classes.name: PPOCRV5ServerDetConvBatchnormLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BN + activation; composes from L1/{conv2d, batch_norm2d}

classes.name: PPOCRV5ServerRecBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: ln1 + attn + ln2 + mlp (pre-norm); inherits CLIPEncoderLayer

classes.name: PPOCRV5ServerRecAttention
classes.rationale: BLIP2-style fused QKV MHA (single Linear of 3*embed_dim, no bias on QKV but optional q_bias+v_bias parameters concatenated); modeling_pp_ocrv5_server_rec.py:102. Non-causal vision attention. Closest is L2/clip_attention.py (separate q/k/v) but here QKV is fused; composes from L1/{linear, sdpa, softmax}; no exact L2 match.

classes.name: PPOCRV5ServerRecConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BN + SiLU (default activation='silu'); composes from L1/{conv2d, batch_norm2d, silu}

classes.name: PPOCRV5ServerRecMLP
classes.rationale: config.hidden_act='gelu': fc1 + GELU + fc2 (FocalNet style, plain 2-layer FFN); maps to L2/encoder_mlp.py-like pattern but without LayerNorm. Composes from L1/{linear, gelu, dropout}.

classes.name: PPOCRV5ServerRecEncoderWithSVTR
classes.rationale: wiring: conv_block stack + svtr transformer blocks + final norm (modeling_pp_ocrv5_server_rec.py:259)

classes.name: PromptDepthAnythingLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: 3 Conv2d 3x3 + 2 ReLU; composes from L1/{conv2d, relu}

classes.name: PromptDepthAnythingPreActResidualLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-act residual block (ReLU + Conv + ReLU + Conv + residual) (modeling_prompt_depth_anything.py:74)

classes.name: PromptDepthAnythingFeatureFusionLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: feature fusion across DPT layers

classes.name: PromptDepthAnythingDepthEstimationHead
classes.rationale: wiring: 3 Conv2d + ReLU/Sigmoid for depth estimation

classes.name: PromptDepthAnythingReassembleLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: DPT reassemble layer (Linear projection + reshape + Conv2d resize)

classes.name: ProphetNetAttention
classes.rationale: BART-family multi-purpose MHA (encoder self / decoder self / cross-attn) with separate q/k/v Linears (with bias). Same pattern as PegasusAttention. No exact kb-nano L2 match.

classes.name: ProphetNetFeedForward
classes.rationale: config.activation_function='gelu': intermediate (Linear) + GELU + dropout + output (Linear) + dropout. Plain 2-layer FFN with GELU; matches L2/encoder_mlp.py structure (without final LayerNorm; ProphetNet applies LayerNorm in the layer).

classes.name: ProphetNetNgramSelfAttention
classes.rationale: ProphetNet-specific n-gram self-attention with main + n-gram heads and absolute relative position bias. Novel; no kb-nano equivalent.
